stories.title: FIA April 16 Technical Meeting — Regulation Tweaks Move Closer to Reality (FOLLOW-UP)

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
TODAY: The FIA holds its second F1 2026 technical meeting.

Energy management. ADUO tweaks. Super clipping.

Then on April 20, team bosses VOTE.

Miami is May 3. The clock is ticking on F1's most talked-about rule fix. #F1Fanrecap #F12026

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
The FIA wants to raise F1's super clipping limit from 250kW to 350kW.

That means MORE overtaking. LESS artificial energy management.

One more meeting April 20. One vote. Then it's official.

This is the fix F1 needed. #F1Fanrecap #F12026 #FIA

article.headline: FIA's April Technical Meeting: What Today's Session Means for F1's 2026 Rule Fixes

stories.title: Mansell: "Everyone Is Rooting for Antonelli" — The Title Battle Gets Personal (NEW STORY)

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Nigel Mansell: "Everyone is rooting for Antonelli."

Helmut Marko: "The question is whether he can maintain that performance. Russell is more experienced."

Two legends. One team. The greatest title battle in F1 is already INSIDE the Mercedes garage. #F1Fanrecap #F12026

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Kimi Antonelli: 72 pts. Youngest F1 championship leader EVER.

Marko's warning: Antonelli "suffered a significant slump" when races moved to Europe last year.

Can he prove it was a one-year blip? Miami answers that. 🏎️ #F1Fanrecap #F12026

article.headline: Mansell, Marko, and the Greatest Title Battle in the Same Garage

stories.title: Russell Reveals "Huge Amount" of Behind-the-Scenes Work on Mercedes Starts (NEW STORY)

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
George Russell at the Nurburgring tyre test:

"There is a HUGE amount going on behind the scenes" on race starts.

Mercedes qualifies No. 1 every race. Can't hold the lead off the line.

They know the problem. They're fixing it. #F1Fanrecap #Mercedes

article.headline: Russell Reveals "Huge Amount" of Behind-the-Scenes Work on Mercedes' Race Start Problem

stories.title: Ferrari's April "Mini Pre-Season" — Miami Upgrade Package Taking Shape (FOLLOW-UP)

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Ferrari's April plan:

April 22 — Monza filming day. New floor. New aero. Cooling upgrades.
May 3 — Miami GP. All of it on the car.

45 points behind Mercedes in the Constructors'.

Ferrari is treating this break like a second pre-season. ⚡ #F1Fanrecap #Ferrari

stories.title: McLaren's Miami Comeback — Stella Promises "More Important Positions" (NEW STORY)

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
McLaren boss Stella on Miami:

"We will be in condition to fight for more important positions."

From double DNS in China to podium contention — McLaren has 5 weeks to make it happen.

Norris is ready. #F1Fanrecap #McLaren #F12026
